message:
feat: polish UI components with Stripe-level visual design

Major visual refresh of all UI components using the new design system:

List Delegate (delegate.go):
- Integrate RenderPriorityBadge and RenderStatusBadge for consistent badges
- Improve visual hierarchy with better color usage
- Enhanced selection highlighting with accent colors
- Better width calculations for responsive layouts

Kanban Board (board.go):
- Elevated card styling with rounded borders
- Subtle backgrounds for unselected cards (ColorBgSubtle)
- Polished metadata chips (assignee, dependencies, labels)
- Improved priority icon integration via GetPriorityIcon

Actionable View (actionable.go):
- Redesigned header with accent background
- Impact summary box with highlighted recommendation
- Track headers with pill-style badges
- Enhanced item rendering with tree connectors
- Better visual separation with subtle dividers
- Selection highlighting with background color

Graph View (graph.go):
- Redesigned metrics panel with grouped sections
- Sections: Importance, Flow & Connectivity, Connections
- Mini-bar visualizations for metric values
- Rank badges with color-coded percentiles
- Normalized metrics against max values for comparison
- Added legend explaining visualization

Helpers (helpers.go):
- Add GetPriorityIcon() returning emoji for priority levels
  (0=🔥 Critical, 1=⚡ High, 2=🔹 Medium, 3=☕ Low, 4=💤 Backlog)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -92,19 +92,37 @@ func (m *ActionableModel) ensureVisible() {
 	}
 	lineNum += 1 + m.selectedItem // header + item position
 
-	visibleLines := m.height - 4 // account for header and footer
+	// Calculate item height (expanded if selected and has unblocks)
+	itemHeight := 1
+	track := m.plan.Tracks[m.selectedTrack]
+	if len(track.Items) > m.selectedItem {
+		if len(track.Items[m.selectedItem].UnblocksIDs) > 0 {
+			itemHeight = 2
+		}
+	}
+
+	visibleLines := m.height - 2 // account for header (2 lines used in Render for header+blank)
 	if visibleLines < 5 {
 		visibleLines = 5
 	}
 
+	// Ensure top is visible
 	if lineNum < m.scrollOffset {
 		m.scrollOffset = lineNum
-	} else if lineNum >= m.scrollOffset+visibleLines {
-		m.scrollOffset = lineNum - visibleLines + 1
+	}
+
+	// Ensure bottom is visible
+	// We need the last line of the item (lineNum + itemHeight - 1) to be visible
+	// The last visible line index is m.scrollOffset + visibleLines - 1
+	// So: lineNum + itemHeight - 1 <= m.scrollOffset + visibleLines - 1
+	//     lineNum + itemHeight <= m.scrollOffset + visibleLines
+	bottomLine := lineNum + itemHeight
+	if bottomLine > m.scrollOffset+visibleLines {
+		m.scrollOffset = bottomLine - visibleLines
 	}
 }

+	// Left side fixed columns with polished badges

 	idWidth := len(idRunes)
